prompt: A cozy pixelated café during winter, showcasing steaming mugs, frosted windows, and a warm fireplace in the corner.
prompt_refined: Generate a pixelated image of a cozy winter café interior. Large frosted windows line the far wall, showing a subtle snowfall outside. Multiple steaming mugs are placed on scattered wooden tables. In the back-right corner, a warm, crackling fireplace casts a soft glow.
